title: HideAndSeekGenerator
description: You need to earn experience to unlock new territories. To access a new chunk, you must accumulate a specific number of experience levels: one level for the first chunk, two for the second. To activate a new chunk, simply click on a barrier.
body:
This plugin introduces a unique game mode where you need to earn experience to unlock new territories. To access a new chunk, you must accumulate a specific number of experience levels: one level for the first chunk, two for the second, three for the third, and so forth. To activate a new chunk, simply click on a barrier. 

![ex](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/870b8b6bf3d567ae20f9560ac24d01f4ccc36cfd.png)

Please note that you may experience lag during the chunk activation process, particularly on lower-performance servers. 

Additionally, ensure that the main world is named "world" for the plugin to function correctly.
[discord](https://discord.gg/4GJhWpDApG)
